flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Spring Hill College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (850 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Spring Hill College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (989 → 782).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Spring Hill College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.1k → $24.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Spring Hill College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.1k → $24.1k).
